description: Creative design briefs and reference library
designPrinciples: Clean and minimal — every element serves a purpose
Generous white space — luxury brands breathe
Strong typography hierarchy — guide the viewer's eye
Consistent brand colours — blue primary, use accent sparingly
Single CTA per piece — clarity over choice
Mobile-first — design for small screens first

visualReferences.takeaway: Let the product speak, remove distractions
Premium photography, elegant typography, confident tone

do: Use BYD blue (#0055A5) as primary colour
Maintain 40%+ white space in every design
Use Geist Sans for headlines and body
Feature the vehicle as the hero element
Include clear CTA in every asset
Keep mobile layouts simple and thumb-friendly
dont: Never use clipart or low-quality illustrations
Never stretch or distort BYD logo
Never use more than 2 font families
Never use neon or overly bright colours
Never hide the CTA or make it small
Never publish without brand guardian review
